name: UBA : Kerberos Account Enumeration Detected
notes: Detects kerberos account enumeration by detecting high number of usernames being used to make Kerberos requests from same source IP.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event QID is one of the following (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP and different Username in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP and different Username in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Kerberos Account Enumeration Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source IP, Destination IP and different Username in 1 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Kerberos Account Enumeration Detected
